name: Dao
author: Jeff Pickering & Ben van Buskirk (~1999) / AGP port
description: Dao (Jeff Pickering & Ben van Buskirk, ~1999) on a 4x4 board. Each player has four pieces, starting on the two main diagonals. A piece slides like a queen but must travel as far as it can in the chosen direction. No captures. Win by arranging your four pieces into a 2x2 square, a full row or column of four, all four board corners, or by getting one of your pieces trapped in a board corner by three opponent pieces.
